Just mashed buttons frantically until my character shot a blue fireball from his hands and the announcer yelled 'KO'.
A very annoying fairy keeps yelling 'Hey! Listen!' while I'm trying to figure out this terrible water temple puzzle.
Flew around tiny planets in space, felt extremely dizzy, and collected shiny stars while a piano soundtrack played.

Hiding in a closet while my character hyperventilates because he looked at a monster for three seconds.
Rushed B, got flashed by my own teammate, and died instantly. Then my team kicked me from the lobby.
Went down to a terrifying underwater city. Fought a giant man in a diving suit to save a creepy little girl.
Drove a BMW through a golf course at 150 miles per hour while 20 police cruisers tried to ram me off the road.

Landed in a field, spent 20 minutes looting empty houses, and got shot by someone hiding in a bush.
Just a fun little card game until my opponent played five legendary cards in one turn and destroyed my entire strategy.
Some guy from Japan created a level that requires frame-perfect jumps and has a 0.01% clear rate. Why do I play this?
Spent three hours digging up treasure chests only to get sunk by a Galleon full of 12-year-olds playing sea shanties.
